issues.description: Runtime validation could not be completed in this sandbox: Vitest failed during config load with esbuild child-process spawn EPERM. Static review found no WI-048 code defect in the diff, but the targeted test suite was not executable here.
issues.recommendation: Re-run the targeted Vitest suite in an environment that permits child-process spawning and confirm it passes.
issues.deferRationale: Environment/tooling restriction, not a code defect in the reviewed change.
